hero.title: Atlas Rouge Immobilier
hero.tagline: Real estate in Marrakech, designed for international buyers
hero.mission: Guiding every buyer with expertise, transparency and passion throughout their property project in Morocco.

story.title: A bridge between Europe and Morocco
story.p1: Atlas Rouge Immobilier was founded in 2012 on a simple conviction: buying a property in Marrakech deserves guidance worthy of the occasion.
story.p2: Founded by a French-Moroccan couple, our agency combines the rigour and transparency of European service with the warmth and intimate knowledge of Moroccan culture.
story.p3: Over ten years, we have guided more than 800 families through their property project — from the first viewing to the handover of keys, including every administrative step along the way.
story.imageAlt: The Atlas Rouge Immobilier team at the Marrakech head office
story.imageCaption: The Atlas Rouge Immobilier team at the Marrakech head office

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: No surprises. Every step is explained, every fee detailed. We believe trust is built on honesty.

expertise.title: Local expertise
expertise.description: We know Marrakech neighbourhood by neighbourhood, street by street. That intimate knowledge makes all the difference in your search.

commitment.title: Commitment
commitment.description: Your project is our project. We stay by your side well beyond the signing, helping you settle in with peace of mind.

cta.title: Ready to find your property?
cta.subtitle: Our team supports you at every stage of your property project in Marrakech.
